## History & Politics
→ [Category index](history-politics/index.md)

| Topic | Description |
|---|---|
| [Barack Obama inaugurated](history-politics/obama-inauguration-2009.md) | Democrat Barack Obama was sworn in as the 44th President on January 20. |
| [Miracle on the Hudson](history-politics/miracle-on-the-hudson.md) | US Airways Flight 1549 ditched in the Hudson River on January 15; all 155 survived. |
| [Iran's Green Movement protests](history-politics/iran-green-movement-2009.md) | Mass protests followed disputed presidential election results in June. |
| [Barack Obama awarded Nobel Peace Prize](history-politics/obama-nobel-peace-prize-2009.md) | Obama received the 2009 Peace Prize on October 9 for efforts to strengthen international diplomacy. |
| [Sonia Sotomayor confirmed to Supreme Court](history-politics/sotomayor-supreme-court-2009.md) | The Senate confirmed Sonia Sotomayor 68–31 on August 6, the first Hispanic and third woman on the Court. |
| [Fort Hood shooting](history-politics/fort-hood-shooting-2009.md) | US Army psychiatrist Nidal Hasan opened fire at Fort Hood on November 5, killing 13. |
| [Copenhagen Climate Conference (COP15)](history-politics/cop15-copenhagen-2009.md) | The 15th UN Climate Change Conference convened December 7–18. |
| [End of the Sri Lankan Civil War](history-politics/sri-lankan-civil-war-end-2009.md) | Government forces defeated the LTTE on May 18, ending a 26-year civil war. |

## Science & Technology
→ [Category index](science-technology/index.md)

| Topic | Description |
|---|---|
| [H1N1 swine flu pandemic](science-technology/h1n1-swine-flu-pandemic.md) | WHO declared a Phase 6 pandemic on June 11 after a novel H1N1 strain emerged in April. |
| [LHC first proton collisions](science-technology/lhc-first-proton-collisions-2009.md) | The Large Hadron Collider achieved first proton-proton collisions at 900 GeV on November 23. |
| [Bitcoin genesis block mined](science-technology/bitcoin-genesis-block-2009.md) | Satoshi Nakamoto mined Block 0 on January 3, launching the world's first decentralized cryptocurrency. |
| [Kepler Space Telescope launched](science-technology/kepler-space-telescope-launch-2009.md) | NASA launched the Kepler exoplanet-hunting telescope on March 6, which discovered over 2,600 confirmed planets. |
| [SpaceX Falcon 9 development](science-technology/spacex-falcon-9-first-flight-2009.md) | SpaceX advanced Falcon 9 through 2009 with nine-engine static fires and a $1.6 billion NASA cargo contract. |
| [Ardi (*Ardipithecus ramidus*) unveiled](science-technology/ardipithecus-ramidus-2009.md) | *Science* published the first full analysis of the 4.4-million-year-old skeleton "Ardi" on October 1. |

## Arts & Culture
→ [Category index](arts-culture/index.md)

| Topic | Description |
|---|---|
| [Michael Jackson dies](arts-culture/michael-jackson-death-2009.md) | Pop star Michael Jackson died of acute propofol intoxication on June 25 at age 50. |
| [*Avatar* theatrical release](arts-culture/avatar-2009.md) | James Cameron's *Avatar* opened December 18, becoming the highest-grossing film of all time. |
| [*Up* theatrical release](arts-culture/up-pixar-2009.md) | Pixar released *Up* on May 29, earning a Best Picture Oscar nomination and becoming a modern animation classic. |
| [*Slumdog Millionaire* at the 81st Academy Awards](arts-culture/slumdog-millionaire-oscars-2009.md) | Danny Boyle's film won eight Oscars including Best Picture on February 22. |
| [51st Grammy Awards](arts-culture/grammy-awards-2009.md) | *Raising Sand* by Robert Plant and Alison Krauss won Album of the Year on February 8; Adele won Best New Artist. |

| Topic | Description |
|---|---|
| [American Recovery and Reinvestment Act](society-economics/american-recovery-act-2009.md) | President Obama signed the $787 billion stimulus on February 17. |
| [Uyghur unrest in Xinjiang](society-economics/uyghur-unrest-xinjiang-2009.md) | Deadly ethnic riots broke out in Ürümqi on July 5, leaving at least 197 dead. |
| [General Motors Chapter 11 bankruptcy](society-economics/general-motors-bankruptcy-2009.md) | GM filed for bankruptcy on June 1 in a government-backed restructuring, one of the largest in US history. |
| [Bernie Madoff sentenced](society-economics/madoff-sentencing-2009.md) | Madoff received 150 years on June 29 for the largest Ponzi scheme in history. |
